To properly symbolicate these, I need to calculate the actual addresses by adding each imageOffset to its corresponding image's base address, then use atos commands to look up the symbols. Continuing with the remaining libcoreclr frames, I can see imageIndex 7 maps to libcoreclr at base address 4332584960, and while `coreclr_execute_assembly` has a symbol at offset 18892, most of these frames are unsymbolicated.
